title: Spaces in quoted file paths
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
To handle spaces in mapping files I used quotes, now it starts to read the file but causes error later.
Yosys was compiled in msys2-64 with tcl support.
` Yosys 0.11+47 (git sha1 113c94384, x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ 10.3.0 -Os)`
I've created directory "c:/space dir", installed yosys in subdirectory yosys_bin
Then loaded file "test.v" with module
```
module test( inio,  outio);
input wire inio ;
output wire outio;
assign outio = ~inio;
endmodule
```
Yosys fails to read file when file path is specified with quotes.
It opens the file, but fails later at some point:
`read_verilog "c:/space dir/test.v"`


The same happens with space-paths in techmap command after some preparation
```
read_verilog test.v
synth -run coarse
techmap -map "c:/space dir/yosys_bin/share/yosys/efinix/cells_map.v
```

## Expected behavior

> yosys> read_verilog test.v
> 1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: test.v
> Parsing Verilog input from `test.v' to AST representation.
> Generating RTLIL representation for module `\test'.
> Successfully finished Verilog frontend.

> yosys> techmap -map cells_map.v
> 
> 4. Executing TECHMAP pass (map to technology primitives).
> 
> 4.1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: cells_map.v
> Parsing Verilog input from `cells_map.v' to AST representation.
> Generating RTLIL representation for module `\$_DFFE_xxxx_'.
> Generating RTLIL representation for module `\$_SDFFE_xxxx_'.
> Generating RTLIL representation for module `\$_SDFFCE_xxxx_'.
> Generating RTLIL representation for module `\$_DLATCH_N_'.
> Generating RTLIL representation for module `\$_DLATCH_P_'.
> Generating RTLIL representation for module `\$lut'.
> Successfully finished Verilog frontend.
> 
> 4.2. Continuing TECHMAP pass.
> No more expansions possible.
> <suppressed ~53 debug messages>

## Actual behavior

> yosys> read_verilog "c:/space dir/test.v"
> 
> 1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: c:/space dir/test.v
> Parsing Verilog input from `c:/space dir/test.v' to AST representation.
> Generating RTLIL representation for module `\test'.
> ERROR: Found control character or space (0x20) in string '$not$c:/space dir/test.v:5$1' which is not allowed in RTLIL identifiers

> yosys> techmap -map "c:/space dir/yosys_bin/share/yosys/efinix/cells_map.v"
> 
> 3. Executing TECHMAP pass (map to technology primitives).
> 
> 3.1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: c:/space dir/yosys_bin/share/yosys/efinix/cells_map.v
> Parsing Verilog input from `c:/space dir/yosys_bin/share/yosys/efinix/cells_map.v' to AST representation.
> Generating RTLIL representation for module `\$_DFFE_xxxx_'.
> Generating RTLIL representation for module `\$_SDFFE_xxxx_'.
> Generating RTLIL representation for module `\$_SDFFCE_xxxx_'.
> Generating RTLIL representation for module `\$_DLATCH_N_'.
> ERROR: Found control character or space (0x20) in string '$logic_not$c:/space dir/yosys_bin/share/yosys/efinix/cells_map.v:61$2' 
> which is not allowed in RTLIL identifiers
